title: sorghastrum viride
intro: Sorghastrum viride, also known as green indiangrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sorghastrum viride include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Sorghastrum viride is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
